summary: 3 newsletters processed. 1 critical (Codex growth), 2 high (GPT-5.6 review + agent harness, Apple v OpenAI). All links are redirect-wrapped — downstream wiki-ingest will need to resolve actual article URLs.

newsletters.subject: [AINews] Codex usage up >10x in 6 months to 7M users, +1M in the past ~day; did Codex overtake Claude Code??
newsletters.wiki_relevance: Directly covers coding agent market dynamics — OpenAI Codex growth trajectory (10x in 6 months, 7M users, +1M in one day) and market positioning vs Claude Code. Core topic for wiki entities (codex, claude-code) and concepts (coding-agent-market, agent-harness).
suggested_wiki_actions: Update [[openai-codex]] entity with 7M user milestone and growth trajectory
Update [[claude-code]] entity with market comparison data
Create or update [[coding-agent-market]] concept with competitive landscape
Check if [[swyx]] entity exists; if not, create from newsletter source

newsletters.subject: 🎙️ How I AI: GPT-5.6 review, How a solo builder runs 24/7 local AI, and What an agent harness is and how to build…
newsletters.wiki_relevance: Covers three distinct wiki-relevant topics: (1) GPT-5.6 model review — new OpenAI model, (2) solo builder running 24/7 local AI — local inference deployment patterns, (3) agent harness concept and how to build one — directly relevant to wiki's agent harness knowledge base.
suggested_wiki_actions: Create or update [[gpt-5-6]] entity page (or [[gpt-5]] family page) with model review
Create or update [[agent-harness]] concept page with build-your-own content
Update [[local-ai-inference]] concept with solo builder 24/7 pattern

newsletters.subject: ⚖️ Apple Drags OpenAI Into Court
newsletters.source: Beehiiv newsletter (source unknown — all links are beehiiv tracking redirects)
newsletters.wiki_relevance: Major industry legal event — Apple suing OpenAI. Relevant to wiki's coverage of AI industry dynamics, Apple-OpenAI relationship, and legal/regulatory landscape. However, all 20 links are beehiiv tracking redirects with no extractable article URL — downstream ingest needs to resolve at least one link to get the actual article content.
suggested_wiki_actions: Create event page for Apple v OpenAI lawsuit under [[events/]]
Update [[apple]] entity page with AI legal strategy
Update [[openai]] entity page with legal challenges

processing_notes: All newsletter links are wrapped in tracking redirects (substack.com/redirect/*, link.mail.beehiiv.com/*). The downstream newsletter-wiki-ingest job must resolve these to actual article URLs before saving raw articles.

The beehiiv newsletter ('Apple Drags OpenAI Into Court') has no identifiable publication name — all 20 links are generic beehiiv tracking URLs. Recommend web-searching the subject line to find the original article if link resolution fails.
The AINews newsletter from swyx is the highest priority for wiki — direct coding agent market data that should update existing entity pages.
